name: Primo Personal Loans
description_short: Tucson, AZ's Primo Personal Loans at 2957 E Speedway Blvd offers fast personal loans with same-day funding available to local residents.
description_long:
Located on E Speedway Boulevard in central Tucson, AZ, Primo Personal Loans operates from its standalone office at 2957 E Speedway Blvd, Suite C1. This Tucson location serves the area with extended weekday hours (7AM–8PM Monday through Friday) and weekend availability (9AM–6PM Saturday and Sunday), making it convenient for working residents and busy schedules.

At this Tucson branch, the team offers personal loans designed for quick access to funds with straightforward application processes. Applicants can call (520) 346-7722 to discuss loan options, ask about eligibility, or apply by phone.

If you're a Tucson resident looking for a personal loan, bring your ID, proof of income, and bank account information to speed up the approval process. The E Speedway location is accessible and easy to reach during regular business hours.
address: 2957 E Speedway Blvd ste c 1, Tucson, AZ 85716

company_info.headquarters: 2957 E Speedway Blvd ste c 1, Tucson, AZ 85716

pros: Applications do not affect your FICO credit score
Loans start at $100 — accessible for very small cash needs
Express Loan process with free quote, no commitment required
Physical branch locations for in-person service
SSL and TLS security on the website
Accessibility toolbar and phone support for users with disabilities
Proactively discloses that non-traditional credit reports may be pulled
cons: No APR, fee structure, or repayment terms disclosed on the website
Maximum loan amount is $5,000 — not suitable for larger needs
Online funding may be delayed up to two business days for verification
Loan availability varies by state — not available nationwide
Non-traditional credit agency pull could affect alternative credit profiles
best_for: Borrowers who want to protect their FICO score during the application process
People needing small short-term loans ($100–$5,000) from a physical branch
Consumers who prefer in-person lending over fully online platforms
Borrowers in states where Primo operates who need quick access to express cash
diagnosis: Primo Personal Loans is best for borrowers seeking small, short-term loans ($100–$5,000) at a physical branch location who want no FICO score impact during the application. The main caveat is a complete lack of public rate and fee disclosure — borrowers must go through the quote process to learn what they'll actually pay, making comparison shopping difficult upfront.
services: In-person loan applications at branch locations
Phone-based customer support and accessibility assistance
meta_description: Primo Personal Loans at 2957 E Speedway Blvd, Tucson, AZ. Fast personal loans with extended hours and same-day funding options available.
